# webflow-templates — LICENSE & SOURCING NOTE

**Scrape date:** 2026-04-21
**Operator:** Regan Cooney (regacooney@gmail.com)

## Contents

- `previews/` — 3 PNG screenshots of webflow.com/templates detail pages (Dashdark X, Dashflow X, Dashkit).
- `recreated/` — 10 authored HTML dark-admin structural approximations.
- `metadata.json` — designer, source URL, template slug.
- `INDEX.md` — top-ranked picks.

## Licence posture

Webflow templates are commercial products purchased from the Webflow marketplace. The previews here are screenshots of the public listing pages; no Webflow Designer file was imported, no React DevLink export was extracted. The `recreated/*.html` files approximate the visible layout pattern using generic CSS — they do NOT reproduce Webflow's rendered output.

To use any of these templates in production: purchase from webflow.com/templates under the creator's licence. This directory is **research-only**, **non-redistributable**.

## Fair-use basis

UK fair-dealing for non-commercial research. Operator is the sole viewer. On request from any named Webflow creator, the corresponding preview will be removed.
